# `@repo/gov-api`

gov-api Hono API service.

## Purpose

This service is a generated Hono API service intended to provide a clean backend runtime boundary inside the monorepo.

## Runtime

This service is currently configured for Bun.

## Commands

```bash
bun run typecheck
bun run test
bun run build
bun run dev
```

## Endpoints
Initial generated endpoints:

￼
GET /
GET /healthz
